name: SLA Escalator
description: Automatically escalate ticket priority when SLA targets are breached. Adds internal notes documenting the escalation and optionally reassigns to a designated group.
author: CLIaaS

actions.name: Escalate Priority
actions.description: Manually escalate the ticket priority by one level

escalateToGroup.description: Group to reassign the ticket to upon escalation

addTag.description: Tag to add to the ticket when escalated
